---
title: "Introduction"
author: 'Members of Yuki Yanai Laboratory'
date: today
description: '{cmdstanr} support page for Bayesian Statistics by Yuki Yanai Laboratory.'
---



# `{cmdstanr}`

Text text text text text text text text text text text text text.

# Bayesian Statistics

Text text text text text text text text text text text text

# Heading 1

Text text text text text text text text text text text text text.
